chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِرَاءِ وَ الْخُصُومَةِ وَ مُعَادَاةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 120 – The quarreling, and the disputing, and the animosity to the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/137)
text: مَنْ نَصَبَ اللَّهَ غَرَضاً لِلْخُصُومَاتِ أَوْشَكَ أَنْ يُكْثِرَ الِانْتِقَالَ .

en.hubeali: And by his chain, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: Whoever targets Allah in a quarrel (fighting against Just) may go through quick transition (from truth to falsehood)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Through the same chain of narrators he has narrated the following: “The Holy Prophet has said, ‘Whoever targets Allah in a quarrel (quarrelling with a creature is quarrelling with Him) may go through quick transitions (from truth to falsehood).”’
